reviews.comment:
Quedó espectacular el local de compras. Nada que envidiarle a las grandes cadenas de cafeterías. Lugar ideal para ir en familia después de una tarde en Palermo.

(Translated by Google)
The shopping center looks amazing. It's just as good as the big coffee chains. It's the perfect place to go with the family after an afternoon in Palermo.

reviews.comment:
Tuve que realizar el cambio de aceite y filtros y aunque fui sin turno, me atendieron rápidamente además de la ventaja de un horario extendido hasta las 17 horas un sábado.

(Translated by Google)
I had to change the oil and filters, and even though I didn't have an appointment, they served me quickly, plus I had the advantage of extended hours until 5 p.m. on a Saturday.
